Part.Source: Event Start &TabCod.Enabled =0 LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) retornaTabelaColunaFilial.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod, &FilTabCod, &FilTabColCod) &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod RetornaAutorizacao.Call('WWPEDIDOCOMPRA', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1, &CustoAutNiv) &CustoMoeda.Visible = 0 //&CustoAutNiv > 1 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Cell_Grid_DWC.Class = !'Invisible WCD_' + upper(Grid.InternalName) Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &ProSts = nullvalue(&ProSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' &OrderedBy.Clear() &OrderedBy.AddItem(1, 'Descrição') &OrderedBy.AddItem(2, 'Ref.Cód.') &OrderedBy.AddItem(3, 'Descrição Produto') &OrderedBy.AddItem(4, 'Marca') If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &OrderedDsc.Visible = False &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ PadraoUsuario.Call('L', &Pgmname, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) if not &PadObs.IsEmpty() Do Case Case Substr(&PadObs,1,1) = 'A' &ProSts = Status_AtivoInativo.ATIVO //ativoInativo pq é filtro Case Substr(&PadObs,1,1) = 'I' &ProSts = Status_AtivoInativo.INATIVO //ativoInativo pq é filtro Otherwise &ProSts.SetEmpty() EndCAse EndIF do 'loadPedido' &ProNom = &inProNom &filtroDisplayCodigoProduto = &inProNom &filtroDisplayCodigoProduto.SetFocus() EndEvent Event Refresh do 'Mostra' RetornaColunasTabelasNomes.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &TabCod, &TabColNom, &TabColNom2, &TabColNom3,&TabColNom4,&TabColNom5,&TabColNom6,&TabColNom7,&TabColNom8,&TabColNom9) if not &TabColNom.IsEmpty() TabPrc1.Title = &TabColNom.Trim() Endif if not &TabColNom2.IsEmpty() TabPrc2.Title = &TabColNom2.trim() Endif if not &TabColNom3.IsEmpty() TabPrc3.Title = &TabColNom3.trim() Endif if not &TabColNom4.IsEmpty() TabPrc4.Title = &TabColNom4.trim() Endif if not &TabColNom5.IsEmpty() TabPrc5.Title = &TabColNom5.trim() Endif if not &TabColNom6.IsEmpty() TabPrc6.Title = &TabColNom6.trim() Endif if not &TabColNom7.IsEmpty() TabPrc7.Title = &TabColNom7.trim() Endif if not &TabColNom8.IsEmpty() TabPrc8.Title = &TabColNom8.trim() Endif if not &TabColNom9.IsEmpty() TabPrc9.Title = &TabColNom9.trim() Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount &EstQtdVarchar.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' &EstSdoVarchar.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ &PadObs = &ProSts //+ &ProGraEstSdo If not &PadObs.IsEmpty() PadraoUsuario.Call('G', &Pgmname, &Context.PesCod, &Context.EmpCod, &PadObs, &PadDtaMod) EndIF EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load RetornaQuantidadePedido.Call(EmpCod, &inFilCod, &inPedCod, 0, ProCod, ProGraCod, &PedQtd) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Selecition = !'' &DetailWebComponent = !'' &CustoMoeda = ProVlrCus &EstQtdVarchar = trim(toformattedString(ProGraEstQtd)) RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(&EstQtdVarchar, &EstQtdVarchar) &EstSdoVarchar = trim(toformattedString(ProGraEstSdo)) RetiraZerosDepoisVirgula.Call(&EstSdoVarchar, &EstSdoVarchar) &EstQtdVarchar.ColumnClass = iif(ProGraEstQtd <= 0, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') &EstSdoVarchar.ColumnClass = iif(ProGraEstSdo <= 0, !'WWColumn WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell', !'WWColumn') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &OrderedBy.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoSeleciona' 4 if not &RetoProCod.IsEmpty() do 'GetVarCod' &WebSession.Set('ProGraRef', &OutProGraRef) &WebSession.Set('RefreshPedidoVenda', &RefreshPedidoVarchar) WWPActions.Popover_Close(TableMain.InternalName, false) EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DetailWebComponent.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid_DWC.Object = wcDetalhamentoProduto.Create(EmpCod, ProCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &MarNom1.Visible = False &MarCod1.Visible = False &ProGraBar1.Visible = False &ProVarNcm1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARCOD' &MarCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROGRABAR' &ProGraBar1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROVARNCM' &ProVarNcm1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &MarNom2.Visible = False &MarCod2.Visible = False &ProGraBar2.Visible = False &ProVarNcm2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARCOD' &MarCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROGRABAR' &ProGraBar2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROVARNCM' &ProVarNcm2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &MarNom3.Visible = False &MarCod3.Visible = False &ProGraBar3.Visible = False &ProVarNcm3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARCOD' &MarCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROGRABAR' &ProGraBar3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROVARNCM' &ProVarNcm3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PRONOM" &ProNom.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"TABCOD" &TabCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROGRAESTSDO" &ProGraEstSdo.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"PROSTS" &ProSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Endif EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' If 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' &MarNom1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARCOD' &MarCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROGRABAR' &ProGraBar1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROVARNCM' &ProVarNcm1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Endif EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' if 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PRONOM", "", not &ProNom.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProNom, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"TABCOD", "", not &TabCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &TabCod, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROGRAESTSDO", "", not &ProGraEstSdo.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProGraEstSdo, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"PROSTS", "", not &ProSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &ProSts, '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Endif EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' if 1=2 //(not &MarNom1.IsEmpty() or not &MarCod1.IsEmpty() or not &ProBar1.IsEmpty() or not &ProVarNcm1.IsEmpty() or not &MarNom2.IsEmpty() or not // &MarCod2.IsEmpty() or not &ProBar2.IsEmpty() or not &ProVarNcm2.IsEmpty() or not &MarNom3.IsEmpty() or not &MarCod3.IsEmpty() or not &ProBar3.IsEmpty() or not &ProVarNcm3.IsEmpty()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MARCOD' AND not &MarCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROGRABAR' AND not &ProGraBar1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProGraBar1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'PROVARNCM' AND not &ProVarNcm1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProVarNcm1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MARCOD' AND not &MarCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROGRABAR' AND not &ProGraBar2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProGraBar2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'PROVARNCM' AND not &ProVarNcm2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProVarNcm2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARNOM' AND not &MarNom3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarNom3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MARCOD' AND not &MarCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MarCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROGRABAR' AND not &ProGraBar3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProGraBar3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'PROVARNCM' AND not &ProVarNcm3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &ProVarNcm3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Endif EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"TabelaPrecoProduto" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &filtroDisplayCodigoProduto.ControlValueChanging(&filtroDisplayCodigoProduto) &ProNom = &filtroDisplayCodigoProduto GRID.Refresh() EndEvent Event &PedQtd.ControlValueChanged &RefreshPedidoVarchar = 'S' prcGravaQuantidadePedido.call(&InEmpCod, &inFilCod, &inPedCod, ProCod, ProGraCod, &PedQtd) RetornaTotalPedido.Call(&InEmpCod, &inFilCod, &inPedCod, &PedVlrBrt, &PedVlrLiq, &PedVlrDscGlb) &WebSession.Set('RefreshPedidoVenda', &RefreshPedidoVarchar) EndEvent Event &RetoProCod.IsValid if not &RetoProCod.IsEmpty() do 'GetVarCod' &WebSession.Set('ProGraRef', &OutProGraRef) &WebSession.Set('RefreshPedidoVenda', &RefreshPedidoVarchar) WWPActions.Popover_Close(TableMain.InternalName, false) EndIF EndEvent Event &Selecition.Click &OutProGraCod = 0 //JDF COMENTEI PRA VER SE RESOLVE UM PROBLEMA &OutProCod = 0 //JDF COMENTEI PRA VER SE RESOLVE UM PROBLEMA &OutProGraRef = ProGraRef &WebSession.Set('ProGraRef', &OutProGraRef) &WebSession.Set('RefreshPedidoVenda', &RefreshPedidoVarchar) WWPActions.Popover_Close(TableMain.InternalName, false) EndEvent Sub 'Mostra' TabPrc1.Visible = 0 TabPrc2.Visible = 0 TabPrc3.Visible = 0 TabPrc4.Visible = 0 TabPrc5.Visible = 0 TabPrc6.Visible = 0 TabPrc7.Visible = 0 TabPrc8.Visible = 0 TabPrc9.Visible = 0 TabPrc1.Class = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc2.Class = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc3.Class = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc4.Class = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc5.Class = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc6.Class = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc7.Class = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc8.Class = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' TabPrc9.Class = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' Do case Case &TabColCod = 1 TabPrc1.Visible = 1 TabPrc1.Class = 'WWColumn' Case &TabColCod = 2 TabPrc2.Visible = 1 TabPrc2.Class = 'WWColumn' Case &TabColCod = 3 TabPrc3.Visible = 1 TabPrc3.Class = 'WWColumn' Case &TabColCod = 4 TabPrc4.Visible = 1 TabPrc4.Class = 'WWColumn' Case &TabColCod = 5 TabPrc5.Visible = 1 TabPrc5.Class = 'WWColumn' Case &TabColCod = 6 TabPrc6.Visible = 1 TabPrc6.Class = 'WWColumn' Case &TabColCod = 7 TabPrc7.Visible = 1 TabPrc7.Class = 'WWColumn' Case &TabColCod = 8 TabPrc8.Visible = 1 TabPrc8.Class = 'WWColumn' Case &TabColCod = 9 TabPrc9.Visible = 1 TabPrc9.Class = 'WWColumn' Otherwise TabPrc1.Class = 'WWColumn' TabPrc2.Class = 'WWColumn' TabPrc3.Class = 'WWColumn' TabPrc4.Class = 'WWColumn' TabPrc5.Class = 'WWColumn' TabPrc6.Class = 'WWColumn' TabPrc7.Class = 'WWColumn' TabPrc8.Class = 'WWColumn' TabPrc9.Class = 'WWColumn' if &TabColCod = 1 TabPrc1.Visible = 1 EndIF if &TabColCod = 2 TabPrc2.Visible = 1 EndIf if &TabColCod = 3 TabPrc3.Visible = 1 Endif if &TabColCod = 4 TabPrc4.Visible = 1 EndIF if &TabColCod = 5 TabPrc5.Visible = 1 EndIF if &TabColCod = 6 TabPrc6.Visible = 1 EndIF if&TabColCod = 7 TabPrc7.Visible = 1 EndIF if &TabColCod = 8 TabPrc8.Visible = 1 EndIF if &TabColCod = 9 TabPrc9.Visible = 1 EndIF EndCase // if &INDAGRIL='S' // &MaisCodigos.Visible = 1 // ProGraRef.Visible = 0 // Else // &MaisCodigos.Visible = 0 // Endif EndSub Sub 'loadPedido' For Each Order EmpCod, FilCod, PedCod where EmpCod = &inEmpCod Where FilCod = &inFilCod Where PedCod = &inPedCod &TabCod = TabCod &TabPrmCod = TabPrmCod &TabColCod = TabColCod &PedVlrBrt = PedVlrBrt &PedVlrLiq = PedVlrLiq Exit EndFor RetornaColunasTabelasNomes.Call(&EmPCod, &TabCod, &TabColNom, &TabColNom2, &TabColNom3,&TabColNom4,&TabColNom5,&TabColNom6,&TabColNom7,&TabColNom8,&TabColNom9) if not &TabColNom.IsEmpty() and &TabColCod = 1 &VendaMoeda.Title = &TabColNom.Trim() Endif if not &TabColNom2.IsEmpty() and &TabColCod = 2 &VendaMoeda.Title = &TabColNom2.trim() Endif if not &TabColNom3.IsEmpty() and &TabColCod = 3 &VendaMoeda.Title = &TabColNom3.trim() Endif if not &TabColNom4.IsEmpty() and &TabColCod = 4 &VendaMoeda.Title = &TabColNom4.trim() Endif if not &TabColNom5.IsEmpty() and &TabColCod = 5 &VendaMoeda.Title = &TabColNom5.trim() Endif if not &TabColNom6.IsEmpty() and &TabColCod = 6 &VendaMoeda.Title = &TabColNom6.trim() Endif if not &TabColNom7.IsEmpty() and &TabColCod = 7 &VendaMoeda.Title = &TabColNom7.trim() Endif if not &TabColNom8.IsEmpty() and &TabColCod = 8 &VendaMoeda.Title = &TabColNom8.trim() Endif if not &TabColNom9.IsEmpty() and &TabColCod = 9 &VendaMoeda.Title = &TabColNom9.trim() Endif EndSub Sub 'GetVarCod' RetornaProdutoReferencia_basico.Call(&EmpCod, &RetoProCod, &InOutProCod, &ProGraCod, &mensage, &IsAchouProduto, &ErroMensagem) For Each Order EmpCod, ProCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where ProCod = &InOutProCod &OutProGraRef = ProGraRef.Trim() Exit EndFor EndSub //Event &filtroDisplayCodigoProduto.IsValid // // if &filtroDisplayCodigoProduto.Length() > 3 // &ProNom = &filtroDisplayCodigoProduto // endif // //EndEvent

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
